states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_pass_spot(), True)
states.description: I need to get open between 3 and 5 meters from teammate, with clear passing lane.

states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: Move to ball and get possession after pass is made.

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: Defender blocks path to goal, so pass to open teammate beyond 2 meters.

states.name: Shoot(goal)
states.description: Path to goal is open, continue to score if possible.

transitions.description: Wait until teammate passes ball to you and you get possession.
Wait until you possess the ball. Defender blocks path to goal, so pass to open teammate beyond 2 meters.
Wait until you possess the ball. Path to goal is open, continue to score if possible.
